title: Device  Home Screen - Starting app without internet connection
scenario: Verify that the app loads missing internet-dependent content (e.g., images) after re-establishing network connectivity.
steps: Launch the app while the device has no internet connection.
Observe the device list on the home screen.
Check if the device appears on the list.
Verify that features requiring internet (e.g., images on the home page) are missing or not displayed.
Turn on the internet connection on the device.
Wait for the app to refresh or manually refresh the home page.
Check that all data and images load and display properly.
expected: After turning on the internet, all data and images should load and display properly.
